title: Temolish
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Temolish''' was the native language of the [[Temolak]] species from [[Zirulast]]. It was described as guttural.

Spacefaring Temolaks were fluent in both Temolish and [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], being literate in both languages.

{{Language-stub}}

*<!-- 2003-04-XX -->''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''
